mapper.select:
SELECT A.CTKEY, A.STGHDKEY, A.STGKEY, A.EXEPRTY, A.STGTYPE, B.JAVABEANID FROM TWORK_INFO_STG_DT A , TWORK_MST_STG B WHERE A.STGKEY=B.STGKEY
AND A.STGKEY = #{stgkey}
AND A.STGTYPE='10'
ORDER BY EXEPRTY ASC
SELECT CTKEY, STGHDKEY, STGKEY, EXEPRTY, STGDTKEY, ATKEY, VALUE1, VALUE2 FROM TWORK_INFO_STG_DTAT
